License

Personal and Educational Use

You are free to use, copy, share, and modify this content for personal and educational purposes. However, any use that portrays the content in a misleading or harmful way is strictly prohibited.

Commercial Use

1. Attribution: For commercial use, you must give appropriate credit to redlii.com, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made. You may do so in any reasonable manner, but not in any way that suggests the licensor endorses you or your use.

2. Royalties: If you use this content for commercial purposes and generate revenue from its use (e.g., selling products or services that incorporate this content), you must pay royalties to redlii.com. Please contact redlii@redlii.com to arrange the royalty terms.

TKiD Artwork License This license applies to all artwork created by TKiD and shared on Instagram or the official website, unless otherwise stated. By using the artwork, you agree to the following terms: ✅ What You Can Do Use the artwork on social media profiles, posts, or edits. Modify or create your own version (fan art, reinterpretation, remix). You may claim ownership of your modified version only if the changes are substantial (new style, composition, or subject matter — not just small edits like adding a line or color). Mix the artwork with characters or other art you own the copyright to. Print the artwork on any type of physical merchandise (clothing, posters, stickers, etc.) and sell it anywhere, but you must inform TKiD first via Instagram DM, mailid, or written letter. ❌ What You Cannot Do Claim the original artwork as your own, unless it has been substantially modified into a new version. Sell digital copies of the artwork. Sell the artwork on Print‑On‑Demand (POD) platforms (such as Redbubble, Teespring, Merch by Amazon, etc.) unless you have explicit written permission from TKiD. Alter the artwork in ways that promote hate, discrimination, or misuse beyond its intended purpose. Add your own brand name, logo, or copyrighted symbols to the artwork. ⚠️ Exceptions This license does not apply to logos or special collaborations with other brands/individuals, as those rights are shared or owned separately. 📩 Conditions If selling printed merchandise, you must notify TKiD first (via Instagram DM, mailid, or written letter). Attribution (“TKiD” name) is encouraged but not mandatory. If the name/logo is already part of the artwork, it must not be removed. TKiD reserves the right to revoke this license if the terms are violated. 💡 Notes You won’t be charged any money for using the artwork under this license. This license is designed to allow creative freedom while protecting TKiD’s brand and collaborations.

[LICENSE]
